./node_modules/promise/lib/done.js:6:0-13:2
> Promise["prototype"]["done"] = function(onFulfilled, onRejected) {
  var self = (arguments["length"] ? this["then"]["apply"](this, arguments) : this);
  self["then"](null, function(err) { setTimeout(function() { throw err; }, 0); });
};

Uncaught TypeError: Cannot convert undefined or null to object
./node_modules/promise/lib/finally.js:6:0-16:2
> Promise["prototype"]["finally"] = function(f) { return this["then"](function(value) { return Promise["resolve"](f())["then"](function() { return value; }); }, function(err) { return Promise["resolve"](f())["then"](function() { throw err; }); }); };

> var p = new Promise(Promise["_61"]);

./node_modules/promise/lib/node-extensions.js:118:0-130:2
> Promise["prototype"]["nodeify"] = function(callback, ctx) {
  if ((typeof callback != "function"))   return this;
  this["then"](function(value) { asap(function() { callback["call"](ctx, null, value); }); }, function(err) { asap(function() { callback["call"](ctx, err); }); });
};

> exec(("git add " + files), function(err) { if (err) { reject(err); } else { resolve(); } });
